meta.name: Muhn Pace
meta.description: Meanwhile, a fellow member of the One Pace Discord community—Muhny (D Goat)—has created a fan edit known as `Muhn Pace`. Using One Pace episodes as a base, he has edited dub versions that closely match the One Pace style.

videos.title: WATCH One Pace Ep [01 to 09]!
videos.description: The earlier episodes of this arc are already covered by One Pace in full. Jump back and watch those first, then continue here. Check the pinned dub guide on r/onepace for the exact watch order.
videos.overview: The earlier episodes of this arc are already covered by One Pace in full. Jump back and watch those first, then continue here. Check the pinned dub guide on r/onepace for the exact watch order.

videos.title: Declaration of War
videos.description: To prove his undying loyalty to Robin, Luffy makes a defiant statement to the World Government.
videos.overview: To prove his undying loyalty to Robin, Luffy makes a defiant statement to the World Government.

videos.title: Jump into the Waterfall!!
videos.description: Franky stages his own rebellious act against Spandam while Luffy's crew makes a daring leap of faith to hopefully gain entrance to the Tower of Justice.
videos.overview: Franky stages his own rebellious act against Spandam while Luffy's crew makes a daring leap of faith to hopefully gain entrance to the Tower of Justice.

videos.title: Pirates vs. CP9
videos.description: The Straw Hats split up to find the correct key before Robin’s fate is sealed. Zoro finds and engages Kaku in battle, and Sogeking attempts to steal a key from the sleeping Jabra.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats split up to find the correct key before Robin’s fate is sealed. Zoro finds and engages Kaku in battle, and Sogeking attempts to steal a key from the sleeping Jabra.

videos.title: Mr. Chivalry
videos.description: Sanji faces his greatest weakness: fighting a beautiful woman! Meanwhile, Franky begins to run low on cola energy, but he must battle the peculiar Fukuro to obtain more of his refreshing fuel from the kitchen.
videos.overview: Sanji faces his greatest weakness: fighting a beautiful woman! Meanwhile, Franky begins to run low on cola energy, but he must battle the peculiar Fukuro to obtain more of his refreshing fuel from the kitchen.

videos.title: Vital Response
videos.description: Refreshed and refueled, Franky turns the tide in his battle with Fukuro. Meanwhile, Zoro and Sogeking must find a way to compensate for their self-imposed handicap, and Chopper unfortunately comes face-to-face with Kumadori.
videos.overview: Refreshed and refueled, Franky turns the tide in his battle with Fukuro. Meanwhile, Zoro and Sogeking must find a way to compensate for their self-imposed handicap, and Chopper unfortunately comes face-to-face with Kumadori.

videos.title: Monster
videos.description: Chopper's abuse of his rumble balls results in a monstrous side effect. In the meantime, Nami learns how Kalifa's new devil fruit powers sapped Sanji of his strength, and a determined Luffy finally catches up to Spandam, Lucci and Robin.
videos.overview: Chopper's abuse of his rumble balls results in a monstrous side effect. In the meantime, Nami learns how Kalifa's new devil fruit powers sapped Sanji of his strength, and a determined Luffy finally catches up to Spandam, Lucci and Robin.

videos.title: The Terrifying Emergency Broadcast
videos.description: As the Marines eke out a comeback against the Straw Hats’ allies, Spandam makes the call Robin most dreaded. In the meantime, Lucci and Luffy begin their mutually anticipated duel, while Nami and Kalifa's fight enters the next phase.
videos.overview: As the Marines eke out a comeback against the Straw Hats’ allies, Spandam makes the call Robin most dreaded. In the meantime, Lucci and Luffy begin their mutually anticipated duel, while Nami and Kalifa's fight enters the next phase.

videos.title: The Hunter
videos.description: Kalifa attempts to counter Nami’s mirages, and something must be done to save Chopper, still on a monstrous rampage. Zoro, now uncuffed, resumes his duel with Kaku. As Sogeking reaches his limit against Jabra, Sanji reappears, and he is hunting wolves.
videos.overview: Kalifa attempts to counter Nami’s mirages, and something must be done to save Chopper, still on a monstrous rampage. Zoro, now uncuffed, resumes his duel with Kaku. As Sogeking reaches his limit against Jabra, Sanji reappears, and he is hunting wolves.

videos.title: Sanji vs. Jabra
videos.description: As Nami drags the wounded Sogeking from the fight to go find Robin, he suddenly counters with a better idea. In the meantime, Sanji faces off against Jabra's Iron Body Kenpo, and, to break the latter's defenses, Sanji unveils his latest technique.
videos.overview: As Nami drags the wounded Sogeking from the fight to go find Robin, he suddenly counters with a better idea. In the meantime, Sanji faces off against Jabra's Iron Body Kenpo, and, to break the latter's defenses, Sanji unveils his latest technique.

videos.title: Zoro vs. Kaku
videos.description: Spandam drags Robin along the Bridge of Hesitation and finally arrives at the Gates of Justice. Meanwhile, Zoro continues his clash with Kaku, and as things become more desperate, Zoro's rage begins to manifest as a dark aura.
videos.overview: Spandam drags Robin along the Bridge of Hesitation and finally arrives at the Gates of Justice. Meanwhile, Zoro continues his clash with Kaku, and as things become more desperate, Zoro's rage begins to manifest as a dark aura.

videos.title: Buster Call
videos.description: Luffy gives Franky the opening he needs to head for Robin. The cyborg runs into trouble at the start of the bridge, but all is not lost as a lone sniper appears atop the Tower of Justice. Despite these minor victories, the buster call commences.
videos.overview: Luffy gives Franky the opening he needs to head for Robin. The cyborg runs into trouble at the start of the bridge, but all is not lost as a lone sniper appears atop the Tower of Justice. Despite these minor victories, the buster call commences.

videos.title: Rob Lucci
videos.description: With time running out, Luffy activates another special ability. The vice admirals of the buster call are shocked to see Luffy taking on Rob Lucci and recall how the CP9 enforcer, even in his youth, held strongly to a dark sense of justice.
videos.overview: With time running out, Luffy activates another special ability. The vice admirals of the buster call are shocked to see Luffy taking on Rob Lucci and recall how the CP9 enforcer, even in his youth, held strongly to a dark sense of justice.

videos.title: The Legend of the Mermaid
videos.description: Lucci corners Luffy, weakened by his new ability’s aftereffects. Back on the bridge, Spandam makes an attempt on Robin's life, so Franky jumps into action. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang is about to drown in the flooded passageway.
videos.overview: Lucci corners Luffy, weakened by his new ability’s aftereffects. Back on the bridge, Spandam makes an attempt on Robin's life, so Franky jumps into action. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang is about to drown in the flooded passageway.

videos.title: The Strongest Family Lineage?! The Vice-Admiral and The Revolutionary!
videos.description: Two days later in Water Seven, Franky hears that the item for he purchased with the Straw Hats' stolen money has arrived. While the pirates recover from the events at Enies Lobby, a Marine vice admiral arrives to pay Luffy an unexpected visit.
videos.overview: Two days later in Water Seven, Franky hears that the item for he purchased with the Straw Hats' stolen money has arrived. While the pirates recover from the events at Enies Lobby, a Marine vice admiral arrives to pay Luffy an unexpected visit.

videos.title: The Extent of the Grand Line and The 600,000,000 Crew!
videos.description: In the New World, not even the Marines' best can keep Red-Haired Shanks from meeting Whitebeard with an especially important request. Meanwhile, at Water Seven, the Franky Family comes to the Straw Hats with some "bad" news.
videos.overview: In the New World, not even the Marines' best can keep Red-Haired Shanks from meeting Whitebeard with an especially important request. Meanwhile, at Water Seven, the Franky Family comes to the Straw Hats with some "bad" news.

videos.title: Forgive Yourself! Franky Departs!
videos.description: The Straw Hats have barely had time to marvel at their new bounties when a new surprise awaits them: the unveiling of their magnificent new ship. The next step is bringing a shipwright into their ranks, and there is only one man for the job.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats have barely had time to marvel at their new bounties when a new surprise awaits them: the unveiling of their magnificent new ship. The next step is bringing a shipwright into their ranks, and there is only one man for the job.

videos.title: The Astonishing Thousand Sunny and Usopp's Tearful Apology!
videos.description: The Straw Hats set sail, but Usopp is conspicuously missing. Zoro soberly reminds Luffy that Usopp's return should not be granted so casually. More immediately, the pirates need to avoid Garp’s barrage of cannon balls!
videos.overview: The Straw Hats set sail, but Usopp is conspicuously missing. Zoro soberly reminds Luffy that Usopp's return should not be granted so casually. More immediately, the pirates need to avoid Garp’s barrage of cannon balls!

videos.title: The Circling Bounties and The Duel on Banaro Island!
videos.description: The Straw Hats’ new wanted posters begin circulating around the world, but three days earlier, Blackbeard began plotting their pursuit. However, one obstacle stood in his way; Ace had finally caught up to his estranged crewmate!
videos.overview: The Straw Hats’ new wanted posters begin circulating around the world, but three days earlier, Blackbeard began plotting their pursuit. However, one obstacle stood in his way; Ace had finally caught up to his estranged crewmate!

videos.title: The Mysterious Sea and The Skeleton Brook!
videos.description: The Thousand Sunny gets flung into the foggy Florian Triangle and the Straw Hats encounter a ruined ship. Speculating as to whether there are ghosts aboard, it turns out the pirates are not far from the truth.
videos.overview: The Thousand Sunny gets flung into the foggy Florian Triangle and the Straw Hats encounter a ruined ship. Speculating as to whether there are ghosts aboard, it turns out the pirates are not far from the truth.

videos.title: Adventure on the Ghost Island and the Famous Doctor Hogback!
videos.description: Brook bids the Straw Hats farewell, and they decide to explore the nearby ghost island Thriller Bark. Freakish danger awaits the landing party the moment they arrive, and, back on the Sunny, the rest of the crew is harassed by an unseen foe.
videos.overview: Brook bids the Straw Hats farewell, and they decide to explore the nearby ghost island Thriller Bark. Freakish danger awaits the landing party the moment they arrive, and, back on the Sunny, the rest of the crew is harassed by an unseen foe.

videos.title: The Invisible Man and the Secret of the Mansion!
videos.description: While staying at Hogback's eerie mansion, Nami is assaulted by an invisible figure in the shower. It does not end there as Usopp battles haunted paintings with a handful of candles. Meanwhile, the rest of the Straw Hats finally make landfall.
videos.overview: While staying at Hogback's eerie mansion, Nami is assaulted by an invisible figure in the shower. It does not end there as Usopp battles haunted paintings with a handful of candles. Meanwhile, the rest of the Straw Hats finally make landfall.

videos.title: General Zombie Night! Thriller Bark's Mysterious Four
videos.description: The Straw Hats learn that the head honcho on the island is one of the Seven Warlords, and he has concocted a shadowy scheme. As Absalom rallies the zombies, the master of Thriller Bark awakens.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats learn that the head honcho on the island is one of the Seven Warlords, and he has concocted a shadowy scheme. As Absalom rallies the zombies, the master of Thriller Bark awakens.

videos.title: Perona's Wonder Garden and the Charge of the General Zombies!
videos.description: Nami, Usopp, and Chopper manage to escape their coffin but find themselves in a garden surrounded by animal zombies, including one acting remarkably like Sanji. It also seems that one by one, the Straw Hats are disappearing.
videos.overview: Nami, Usopp, and Chopper manage to escape their coffin but find themselves in a garden surrounded by animal zombies, including one acting remarkably like Sanji. It also seems that one by one, the Straw Hats are disappearing.

videos.title: Number 900?! Lola's Pursuit and the Humming Swordsman
videos.description: Lola attacks Nami out of ignorant jealousy, but the Sanji-esque zombie plays interference. Meanwhile, with Luffy captured, and Franky and Robin left to face a massive spider monkey, a familiar bony figure falls from the sky.
videos.overview: Lola attacks Nami out of ignorant jealousy, but the Sanji-esque zombie plays interference. Meanwhile, with Luffy captured, and Franky and Robin left to face a massive spider monkey, a familiar bony figure falls from the sky.

videos.title: The Fearsome Ability of the Shadow Fruit! The Ultimate Number 900!
videos.description: Gecko Moria takes his next step toward his goal of eventually becoming king of the pirates by creating the ultimate zombie. Luffy's shadow in hand, Moria begins the revival of the much-anticipated number 900.
videos.overview: Gecko Moria takes his next step toward his goal of eventually becoming king of the pirates by creating the ultimate zombie. Luffy's shadow in hand, Moria begins the revival of the much-anticipated number 900.

videos.title: Oars' Awakening and Brook vs. Ryuma!
videos.description: Dead for 500 years and left in a deep freeze since, Oars awakens, fueled by Luffy's shadow. Soon after, Nami, Usopp, and Chopper are discovered hiding inside Perona's pet bear, and Absalom abducts Nami for his demented marriage ceremony.
videos.overview: Dead for 500 years and left in a deep freeze since, Oars awakens, fueled by Luffy's shadow. Soon after, Nami, Usopp, and Chopper are discovered hiding inside Perona's pet bear, and Absalom abducts Nami for his demented marriage ceremony.

videos.title: The Hope and Despair of the Skeleton and the Straw Hats' Counterattack!
videos.description: The Straw Hats regroup on the Sunny in a pitiable state, but not before Brook leaves Franky with some valuable information. In addition, they now know of the promise Brook made to a certain friend fifty years ago, someone the Straw Hats know well.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats regroup on the Sunny in a pitiable state, but not before Brook leaves Franky with some valuable information. In addition, they now know of the promise Brook made to a certain friend fifty years ago, someone the Straw Hats know well.

videos.title: Already Negative! Usopp's Courageous Stand!
videos.description: Oars' entry into the fight suddenly changes everything! Then, when Perona attacks, only one of the pirates seems to be immune to her negative powers. Due to his glass-half-empty personality, Usopp might have what it takes to defeat the Ghost Princess.
videos.overview: Oars' entry into the fight suddenly changes everything! Then, when Perona attacks, only one of the pirates seems to be immune to her negative powers. Due to his glass-half-empty personality, Usopp might have what it takes to defeat the Ghost Princess.

videos.title: A Stolen Dream! Sanji vs. Absalom
videos.description: Sanji crashes Absalom's sham of a wedding, the fire in his heart burning brightly as he rescues Nami. A curious connection between Sanji and the Clear-Clear Fruit is revealed, and he vows to defeat Absalom for ruining his lifelong dream.
videos.overview: Sanji crashes Absalom's sham of a wedding, the fire in his heart burning brightly as he rescues Nami. A curious connection between Sanji and the Clear-Clear Fruit is revealed, and he vows to defeat Absalom for ruining his lifelong dream.

videos.title: Perona's Terror! Usopp vs. the Ghost Princess!
videos.description: After getting the stuffing beat out of him by a zombie teddy bear, Usopp summons his sharp-shooting alter ego to help him discover the secret to defeating Perona! He reaches deep into his devious bag of tricks to even the odds in this spooky battle.
videos.overview: After getting the stuffing beat out of him by a zombie teddy bear, Usopp summons his sharp-shooting alter ego to help him discover the secret to defeating Perona! He reaches deep into his devious bag of tricks to even the odds in this spooky battle.

videos.title: Zoro vs. Ryuuma and Chopper's Rage!
videos.description: Zoro stands in for Brook and duels Ryuma, the swordsman zombie from faraway Wano. In the mansion, Chopper's former respect for Dr. Hogback is completely erased after coming to realize the man's twisted views on life.
videos.overview: Zoro stands in for Brook and duels Ryuma, the swordsman zombie from faraway Wano. In the mansion, Chopper's former respect for Dr. Hogback is completely erased after coming to realize the man's twisted views on life.

videos.title: Show Yourselves, Straw Hat Pirates! The Crew's Hopeless Counterattack!
videos.description: With Oars now a fully obedient zombie, Gecko Moria takes his leave while instructing the giant to hunt down the pirates, whose wanted posters are sewn onto his arm. One by one, the Straw Hats' battles are interrupted by Oars' march around Thriller Bark.
videos.overview: With Oars now a fully obedient zombie, Gecko Moria takes his leave while instructing the giant to hunt down the pirates, whose wanted posters are sewn onto his arm. One by one, the Straw Hats' battles are interrupted by Oars' march around Thriller Bark.

videos.title: Clash! The Titanic Battle Against Zombie 900!
videos.description: The Straw Hats sans Luffy are faced with the insurmountable task of taking out Oars. To knock him down, Franky decides they will need to use his newly developed tactic. But as they begin "docking" onto one another, a slight problem arises.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats sans Luffy are faced with the insurmountable task of taking out Oars. To knock him down, Franky decides they will need to use his newly developed tactic. But as they begin "docking" onto one another, a slight problem arises.

videos.title: The Mysterious Visitor! The Two Warlords Meet!
videos.description: While the Straw Hats continue to wear away at Oars, Nami confronts Perona attempting to escape on board the Thousand Sunny, but the sudden appearance of a large, mysterious figure soon makes her efforts moot.
videos.overview: While the Straw Hats continue to wear away at Oars, Nami confronts Perona attempting to escape on board the Thousand Sunny, but the sudden appearance of a large, mysterious figure soon makes her efforts moot.

videos.title: Combination of Brains and Brawn! Oars and Moriah vs. the Straw Hats!
videos.description: To give Luffy a fighting chance against Moria, Lola and her pirate crew propose a plan to fight shadow with shadow. Meanwhile, Gecko Moria uses his abilities to enhance and manipulate Oars’ massive body.
videos.overview: To give Luffy a fighting chance against Moria, Lola and her pirate crew propose a plan to fight shadow with shadow. Meanwhile, Gecko Moria uses his abilities to enhance and manipulate Oars’ massive body.

videos.title: The Crew's Annihilation! Oars vs. Nightmare Luffy
videos.description: Moria’s strange combination with Oars defeats the Straw Hats one after the other. They are at their breaking point when a powerful figure swoops in and takes up the fight in their stead. The hellish creation: Nightmare Luffy!
videos.overview: Moria’s strange combination with Oars defeats the Straw Hats one after the other. They are at their breaking point when a powerful figure swoops in and takes up the fight in their stead. The hellish creation: Nightmare Luffy!

videos.title: Morning Comes! The Straw Hats' Ultimate Attack!
videos.description: Oars recovers from Nightmare Luffy's assault, but the Straw Hats all get back on their feet and launch a final devastating attack on Oars. Morning fast approaches, and Moria is far from finished, ready to use his ultimate technique.
videos.overview: Oars recovers from Nightmare Luffy's assault, but the Straw Hats all get back on their feet and launch a final devastating attack on Oars. Morning fast approaches, and Moria is far from finished, ready to use his ultimate technique.

videos.title: The Power That Can Deflect Anything?! Zoro Fights Prepared to Die!
videos.description: Moria’s defeat returns the shadows of all his victims. However, one Warlord remains on the island, and he has orders to terminate the Straw Hats and everyone else in the area. A lone Zoro faces Kuma in vain and is presented with a deadly choice.
videos.overview: Moria’s defeat returns the shadows of all his victims. However, one Warlord remains on the island, and he has orders to terminate the Straw Hats and everyone else in the area. A lone Zoro faces Kuma in vain and is presented with a deadly choice.

videos.title: Brook's Past! The Rumbar Pirates and Laboon!
videos.description: Brook recalls his past, thinking back on the time when the small whale Laboon started following his pirate ship and befriended the crew.
videos.overview: Brook recalls his past, thinking back on the time when the small whale Laboon started following his pirate ship and befriended the crew.

videos.title: Brook's Promise! The Eighth Member
videos.description: At death's door, the Rumbar Pirates sang "Binks' Brew" one last time and recorded it in a tone dial, hoping to one day deliver it to Laboon. With their new crewmate and musician Brook on board, the Straw Hats bid farewell to Lola’s crew.
videos.overview: At death's door, the Rumbar Pirates sang "Binks' Brew" one last time and recorded it in a tone dial, hoping to one day deliver it to Laboon. With their new crewmate and musician Brook on board, the Straw Hats bid farewell to Lola’s crew.

videos.title: Flying Fish Riders
videos.description: As the Straw Hats journey to Fishman Island, they reach the Red Line, the halfway point along the Grand Line. When a sea king appears, Luffy easily dispatches it, but it spits up a mermaid and a talking starfish onto the deck of the Sunny.
videos.overview: As the Straw Hats journey to Fishman Island, they reach the Red Line, the halfway point along the Grand Line. When a sea king appears, Luffy easily dispatches it, but it spits up a mermaid and a talking starfish onto the deck of the Sunny.

videos.title: Iron Mask Duval
videos.description: The Straw Hats arrive at Duval's (eerily quiet) base and manage to locate Camie's captured friend. Realizing the captive’s identity, the Straw Hats reluctantly agree to rescue him, and only in exchange for directions to Fishman Island.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats arrive at Duval's (eerily quiet) base and manage to locate Camie's captured friend. Realizing the captive’s identity, the Straw Hats reluctantly agree to rescue him, and only in exchange for directions to Fishman Island.

videos.title: Duval's Tragedy
videos.description: Blaming Sanji for his misfortunes, Duval swears vengeance on the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, the Flying Fish Riders attempt to sink the Sunny, but the ship is far from vulnerable. Finally, Sanji himself faces Duval in a bid to end things.
videos.overview: Blaming Sanji for his misfortunes, Duval swears vengeance on the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, the Flying Fish Riders attempt to sink the Sunny, but the ship is far from vulnerable. Finally, Sanji himself faces Duval in a bid to end things.

videos.title: Adventure on the Archipelago of Dancing Soap Bubbles
videos.description: The Straw Hats make their way to Sabaody Archipelago to prepare the Sunny for its undersea voyage to Fishman Island. During their search for a coating mechanic, the Straw Hats encounter the Celestial Dragons, the cruel rulers of the World Government.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats make their way to Sabaody Archipelago to prepare the Sunny for its undersea voyage to Fishman Island. During their search for a coating mechanic, the Straw Hats encounter the Celestial Dragons, the cruel rulers of the World Government.

videos.title: The Embers of History
videos.description: While at Shakky’s Rip-off Bar, the Straw Hats learn that Luffy, Zoro and nine other rookie pirates on Sabaody have reached a certain level of infamy. Later, Zoro has a close call with an insufferable and sadistic Celestial Dragon.
videos.overview: While at Shakky’s Rip-off Bar, the Straw Hats learn that Luffy, Zoro and nine other rookie pirates on Sabaody have reached a certain level of infamy. Later, Zoro has a close call with an insufferable and sadistic Celestial Dragon.

videos.title: The Auction House Incident
videos.description: Nami's group arrives at the Grove 1 auction house where Camie will be sold to the highest bidder. With 200 million berries in hand, Nami is determined to win back their friend. The auction wears on as Luffy and co. race to the grove.
videos.overview: Nami's group arrives at the Grove 1 auction house where Camie will be sold to the highest bidder. With 200 million berries in hand, Nami is determined to win back their friend. The auction wears on as Luffy and co. race to the grove.

videos.title: An Island in Chaos
videos.description: As chaos erupts inside the auction house, a mysterious man with an equally mysterious power emerges from backstage. But now, due to Luffy’s insolent actions, a Marine admiral is on his way to Sabaody.
videos.overview: As chaos erupts inside the auction house, a mysterious man with an equally mysterious power emerges from backstage. But now, due to Luffy’s insolent actions, a Marine admiral is on his way to Sabaody.

videos.title: Roger and Rayleigh
videos.description: The Marines surround the auction house, and super rookies Monkey D. Luffy, Eustass Kid, and Trafalgar Law all want a piece of the action. Later, Rayleigh reveals his shocking past to the Straw Hats.
videos.overview: The Marines surround the auction house, and super rookies Monkey D. Luffy, Eustass Kid, and Trafalgar Law all want a piece of the action. Later, Rayleigh reveals his shocking past to the Straw Hats.

videos.title: Kizaru Arrives
videos.description: Luffy and his crew decide to lay low in town while Rayleigh coats the Sunny. Meanwhile, Admiral Kizaru from Marine HQ arrives on the archipelago in search of those responsible for threatening the Celestial Dragons.
videos.overview: Luffy and his crew decide to lay low in town while Rayleigh coats the Sunny. Meanwhile, Admiral Kizaru from Marine HQ arrives on the archipelago in search of those responsible for threatening the Celestial Dragons.

videos.title: Kizaru vs. the Four Captains
videos.description: While four super rookies square off against Kizaru, the Straw Hats combine their strongest attacks to defeat the pacifista menacing them. The battle is barely won when yet another, deadlier foe comes to take its place.
videos.overview: While four super rookies square off against Kizaru, the Straw Hats combine their strongest attacks to defeat the pacifista menacing them. The battle is barely won when yet another, deadlier foe comes to take its place.

videos.title: I Couldn't Save Them!!!
videos.description: In the face of overwhelming danger, Luffy orders a full retreat. However, Warlord Kuma cuts off their frenzied escape and uses a harrowing touch of his devil fruit powers against Luffy’s crewmates, one by one.
videos.overview: In the face of overwhelming danger, Luffy orders a full retreat. However, Warlord Kuma cuts off their frenzied escape and uses a harrowing touch of his devil fruit powers against Luffy’s crewmates, one by one.

videos.title: Adventure on the Island of Women
videos.description: Luffy finds himself alone, stranded and starving on an unfamiliar island. After a run-in with some exotic mushrooms, he is approached by a team of female warriors who could be friend... or foe.
videos.overview: Luffy finds himself alone, stranded and starving on an unfamiliar island. After a run-in with some exotic mushrooms, he is approached by a team of female warriors who could be friend... or foe.

videos.title: Pirate Empress Boa Hancock
videos.description: Luffy storms the village of women in hopes of acquiring a boat. However, a misstep lands him in the personal bath of none other than the Snake Princess. As he peers through the steam rising from its waters, he sees a forbidden secret etched upon her back.
videos.overview: Luffy storms the village of women in hopes of acquiring a boat. However, a misstep lands him in the personal bath of none other than the Snake Princess. As he peers through the steam rising from its waters, he sees a forbidden secret etched upon her back.

videos.title: The Arena
videos.description: Luffy is sentenced to execution by arena combat with Boa Hancock’s serpentine sisters. Luffy soon discovers that the two women have a mysterious ability that allows them to slither through all his attacks unharmed.
videos.overview: Luffy is sentenced to execution by arena combat with Boa Hancock’s serpentine sisters. Luffy soon discovers that the two women have a mysterious ability that allows them to slither through all his attacks unharmed.

videos.title: Hancock's Confession
videos.description: Impressed by Luffy’s efforts to protect the secret of the snake sisters, Hancock reveals the story behind the familiar mark on their backs. Their childhood was tragic, suffered at the hands of a corrupt group that Luffy knows all too well.
videos.overview: Impressed by Luffy’s efforts to protect the secret of the snake sisters, Hancock reveals the story behind the familiar mark on their backs. Their childhood was tragic, suffered at the hands of a corrupt group that Luffy knows all too well.

videos.title: No One Can Stop This Now
videos.description: As Luffy prepares to depart Amazon Lily, Hancock suddenly takes ill. Taking heed of the knowledge and wisdom of Elder Nyon, the Snake Princess “recovers,” and a plan to save Ace is quickly hatched.
videos.overview: As Luffy prepares to depart Amazon Lily, Hancock suddenly takes ill. Taking heed of the knowledge and wisdom of Elder Nyon, the Snake Princess “recovers,” and a plan to save Ace is quickly hatched.

videos.title: The Underwater Prison, Impel Down
videos.description: To rescue his brother Ace, Luffy must infiltrate the well-guarded prison Impel Down. He eludes the watchful eyes of security for a time, and then, for better or worse, a certain red-nosed criminal appears.
videos.overview: To rescue his brother Ace, Luffy must infiltrate the well-guarded prison Impel Down. He eludes the watchful eyes of security for a time, and then, for better or worse, a certain red-nosed criminal appears.

videos.title: First Son of the Sea
videos.description: After forming an unlikely alliance, Luffy rushes through Impel Down aided by Buggy's powers. Meanwhile, Ace finds himself with an unlikely companion as well when he exchanges words with a powerful pirate prisoner.
videos.overview: After forming an unlikely alliance, Luffy rushes through Impel Down aided by Buggy's powers. Meanwhile, Ace finds himself with an unlikely companion as well when he exchanges words with a powerful pirate prisoner.

videos.title: From One Hell to Another
videos.description: Luffy and his dubious companions face off against the mythical beasts of Level 2. Impel Down is put on lockdown, its only exit sealed, but Luffy, unaware and unafraid, continues to Ace's floor, only to have another unexpected reunion.
videos.overview: Luffy and his dubious companions face off against the mythical beasts of Level 2. Impel Down is put on lockdown, its only exit sealed, but Luffy, unaware and unafraid, continues to Ace's floor, only to have another unexpected reunion.

videos.title: Inferno Hell

videos.title: Thank You

videos.title: Heaven and Earth
videos.description: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts toward slowing the birdcage. Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, advances to attack Viola, and a hero’s recovery cannot come soon enough!
videos.overview: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts toward slowing the birdcage. Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, advances to attack Viola, and a hero’s recovery cannot come soon enough!

videos.title: Prostration
videos.description: The people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy as they remember the hardships endured and the actions taken to free them. As they beg King Riku to resume the crown, Admiral Fujitora shocks onlookers with an unexpected display of humility.
videos.overview: The people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy as they remember the hardships endured and the actions taken to free them. As they beg King Riku to resume the crown, Admiral Fujitora shocks onlookers with an unexpected display of humility.

videos.title: Sabo's Adventure
videos.description: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army and how he reunited with his brother Luffy at the colosseum.
videos.overview: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army and how he reunited with his brother Luffy at the colosseum.

videos.title: Soldier-san's Conviction
videos.description: Major players in the Marines arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats, and Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a cover story. Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port, but not before finishing up a piece of business.
videos.overview: Major players in the Marines arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats, and Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a cover story. Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port, but not before finishing up a piece of business.

videos.title: Father and Sons
videos.description: Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazón and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Luffy and the others finally make their break from the island; however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story of the Straw Hat Pirates!
videos.overview: Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazón and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Luffy and the others finally make their break from the island; however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story of the Straw Hat Pirates!

videos.title: Zou
videos.description: The mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. When the haze clears, what greets the Straw Hats is beyond anyone’s expectations! Luffy and co. find the Sunny nearby, but the rest of the crew has already disembarked.
videos.overview: The mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. When the haze clears, what greets the Straw Hats is beyond anyone’s expectations! Luffy and co. find the Sunny nearby, but the rest of the crew has already disembarked.

videos.title: The Mink Tribe
videos.description: The mysterious "island" may hold more danger than was bargained for, as Luffy and co. learn they are not alone! Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest, but he is treading territory where he is not welcome.
videos.overview: The mysterious "island" may hold more danger than was bargained for, as Luffy and co. learn they are not alone! Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest, but he is treading territory where he is not welcome.

videos.title: At Rightflank Fortress
videos.description: Luffy and co. ride out the rain-ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou. As they continue toward the fortress, they learn more about the mysterious minks, and are finally reunited with the others.
videos.overview: Luffy and co. ride out the rain-ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou. As they continue toward the fortress, they learn more about the mysterious minks, and are finally reunited with the others.

videos.title: Duke Inuarashi and Master Nekomamushi
videos.description: The Straw Hats finally meet the daytime ruler of this strange land. They learn more about the battle that took place here and discover the mysterious system by which the island is ruled.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats finally meet the daytime ruler of this strange land. They learn more about the battle that took place here and discover the mysterious system by which the island is ruled.

videos.title: The Curly Hat Pirates Arrive
videos.description: While they put up a good fight, the minks were not able to subdue Jack. In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack, Chopper and Sanji rushed in to save the fallen minks and enlisted the help of Caesar to overcome the lingering gas problem.
videos.overview: While they put up a good fight, the minks were not able to subdue Jack. In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack, Chopper and Sanji rushed in to save the fallen minks and enlisted the help of Caesar to overcome the lingering gas problem.

videos.title: Tea Party Invitation
videos.description: The mystery of Sanji's disappearance only deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom’s lackeys caught up with him and offered him an invitation from one of the Four Emperors that simply could not be refused.
videos.overview: The mystery of Sanji's disappearance only deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom’s lackeys caught up with him and offered him an invitation from one of the Four Emperors that simply could not be refused.

videos.title: Let's Go See Master Nekomamushi
videos.description: Being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate! The pirates make their way toward the nighttime ruler to find out more about their friend's disappearance.
videos.overview: Being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate! The pirates make their way toward the nighttime ruler to find out more about their friend's disappearance.

videos.title: Raizo of the Mist
videos.description: Revelations abound as the true nature of the men from Wano and their relationship with the minks is revealed, and Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined. But even more shocking is the visage of a real ninja!
videos.overview: Revelations abound as the true nature of the men from Wano and their relationship with the minks is revealed, and Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined. But even more shocking is the visage of a real ninja!

videos.title: Momonosuke, Heir of the Kozuki Family
videos.description: More mysteries of the Kozuki Clan are revealed, and its retainers propose an alliance to help topple one of the Four Emperors: Kaido of the Beast Pirates! But first, Luffy has some important Straw Hat business to attend to.
videos.overview: More mysteries of the Kozuki Clan are revealed, and its retainers propose an alliance to help topple one of the Four Emperors: Kaido of the Beast Pirates! But first, Luffy has some important Straw Hat business to attend to.

videos.title: Understood
videos.description: The Straw Hats divide and conquer: one group to go save Sanji, and the other to Wano! But just before their departure, the tremendous elephant quakes as Jack’s fleet launches an aggressive attack on the monstrous Zunesha.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats divide and conquer: one group to go save Sanji, and the other to Wano! But just before their departure, the tremendous elephant quakes as Jack’s fleet launches an aggressive attack on the monstrous Zunesha.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 01
videos.description: Luffy's team—plus a stowaway—sets out from Zou on their way to win back Sanji. Meanwhile, the leading families and leaders of the world make their way to the Holy Land, Mary Geoise, for a pivotal round table conference.
videos.overview: Luffy's team—plus a stowaway—sets out from Zou on their way to win back Sanji. Meanwhile, the leading families and leaders of the world make their way to the Holy Land, Mary Geoise, for a pivotal round table conference.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 02
videos.description: Without Sanji to properly identify safe and edible food, Luffy gets a stomach full of poisonous fish! With no antidotes on board, the Straw Hats must rely on a couple of mysterious—yet somehow familiar—passersby for help.
videos.overview: Without Sanji to properly identify safe and edible food, Luffy gets a stomach full of poisonous fish! With no antidotes on board, the Straw Hats must rely on a couple of mysterious—yet somehow familiar—passersby for help.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 03
videos.description: Arriving on Cacao Island, Luffy and Chopper are in heaven as everything before their eyes is edible. There, the Straw Hats encounter Sanji’s betrothed, Pudding, but when they challenge her for Sanji's heart, her answer is truly shocking.
videos.overview: Arriving on Cacao Island, Luffy and Chopper are in heaven as everything before their eyes is edible. There, the Straw Hats encounter Sanji’s betrothed, Pudding, but when they challenge her for Sanji's heart, her answer is truly shocking.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 04
videos.description: Big Mom ravages Whole Cake Island in search of sweets, and while a familiar face across the waters has just what she needs, he also brings ill tidings. As the Straw Hats draw closer to the island, Pedro shares his sordid past in Big Mom’s territory.
videos.overview: Big Mom ravages Whole Cake Island in search of sweets, and while a familiar face across the waters has just what she needs, he also brings ill tidings. As the Straw Hats draw closer to the island, Pedro shares his sordid past in Big Mom’s territory.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 05
videos.description: Luffy’s group makes its way toward Sanji, only to be distracted by the endless supply of sweets and a second Luffy. Before they realize it, they are lost in the Seducing Woods! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his older brother.
videos.overview: Luffy’s group makes its way toward Sanji, only to be distracted by the endless supply of sweets and a second Luffy. Before they realize it, they are lost in the Seducing Woods! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his older brother.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 06
videos.description: Sanji faces his father in a duel as the wounds of his childhood are laid bare! Meanwhile, Luffy falls for the illusions of the forest, and Big Mom has Caesar at her whims, ready to use him to continue her maniacal pursuits.
videos.overview: Sanji faces his father in a duel as the wounds of his childhood are laid bare! Meanwhile, Luffy falls for the illusions of the forest, and Big Mom has Caesar at her whims, ready to use him to continue her maniacal pursuits.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 07
videos.description: The mysterious half-buried man comes clean about his identity, but this must all be put aside when one of Big Mom's most powerful commanders comes calling. Nami's past exploits, however, hold the key to keeping the baddies at bay.
videos.overview: The mysterious half-buried man comes clean about his identity, but this must all be put aside when one of Big Mom's most powerful commanders comes calling. Nami's past exploits, however, hold the key to keeping the baddies at bay.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 08
videos.description: Luffy squares off against a commander of Big Mom, Charlotte Cracker, whose powers may prove more troublesome than they appear. Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro infiltrate Whole Cake Island and work out a plan to avoid getting caught.
videos.overview: Luffy squares off against a commander of Big Mom, Charlotte Cracker, whose powers may prove more troublesome than they appear. Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro infiltrate Whole Cake Island and work out a plan to avoid getting caught.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 09
videos.description: Sanji challenges his entire family, but they have effectively ensured he follows their wedding scheme. The truth of Germa's power and Vinsmoke Judge’s dark history is also revealed. Meanwhile, Nami has recruited the homies and challenges Cracker!
videos.overview: Sanji challenges his entire family, but they have effectively ensured he follows their wedding scheme. The truth of Germa's power and Vinsmoke Judge’s dark history is also revealed. Meanwhile, Nami has recruited the homies and challenges Cracker!

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 10
videos.description: Sanji’s tragic history included a rare moment of compassion that was his only chance at escape, but even then, his father’s cruelty haunted him. In the present, Reiju helps Sanji straighten himself out before he meets with his fiancée.
videos.overview: Sanji’s tragic history included a rare moment of compassion that was his only chance at escape, but even then, his father’s cruelty haunted him. In the present, Reiju helps Sanji straighten himself out before he meets with his fiancée.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 11
videos.description: Luffy finishes off Cracker and finally catches up with Sanji, but the Straw Hats’ cook seems far from thrilled about the reunion. A heartbreaking duel commences, but a steadfast Luffy makes a solemn vow to his friend and crewmate.
videos.overview: Luffy finishes off Cracker and finally catches up with Sanji, but the Straw Hats’ cook seems far from thrilled about the reunion. A heartbreaking duel commences, but a steadfast Luffy makes a solemn vow to his friend and crewmate.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 12
videos.description: Luffy stands his ground and waits for Sanji to return, but as the vengeful army washes over him, only a true friend can step in to help. At Big Mom’s castle, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage and come to a startling conclusion!
videos.overview: Luffy stands his ground and waits for Sanji to return, but as the vengeful army washes over him, only a true friend can step in to help. At Big Mom’s castle, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage and come to a startling conclusion!

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 13
videos.description: Pedro creates a diversion for Brook to put his soulful plan into action. Meanwhile, the captured Luffy continues to goad Big Mom, and Pudding has the beginnings of rebellion stirring up inside her.
videos.overview: Pedro creates a diversion for Brook to put his soulful plan into action. Meanwhile, the captured Luffy continues to goad Big Mom, and Pudding has the beginnings of rebellion stirring up inside her.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 14
videos.description: When Pudding arrives to meet the captured Luffy and Nami, their hopefulness suddenly turns to shock! To make matters worse, Brook comes face to face with Big Mom herself! At the risk of his own well-being, Luffy desperately tries to free himself.
videos.overview: When Pudding arrives to meet the captured Luffy and Nami, their hopefulness suddenly turns to shock! To make matters worse, Brook comes face to face with Big Mom herself! At the risk of his own well-being, Luffy desperately tries to free himself.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 15
videos.description: Things are looking grim for Luffy and Nami until an unexpected ally appears. Elsewhere, Sanji confronts his sister about what Pudding plans to do and learns the powerful secret of their mother's undying love.
videos.overview: Things are looking grim for Luffy and Nami until an unexpected ally appears. Elsewhere, Sanji confronts his sister about what Pudding plans to do and learns the powerful secret of their mother's undying love.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 16
videos.description: Luffy fights through more obstacles in search of Sanji, and Brook hears Big Mom's plan firsthand as she shares her intentions with Pudding. While Big Mom's agents believe most of the Straw Hats to be under their control, Mont d'Or has his doubts.
videos.overview: Luffy fights through more obstacles in search of Sanji, and Brook hears Big Mom's plan firsthand as she shares her intentions with Pudding. While Big Mom's agents believe most of the Straw Hats to be under their control, Mont d'Or has his doubts.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 17
videos.description: Nami and co. finally locate Brook using the Mirro-world, but he is in the most inopportune of places! Meanwhile, Luffy is waylaid on his way back to the rendezvous, and Jinbe shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hat pirates.
videos.overview: Nami and co. finally locate Brook using the Mirro-world, but he is in the most inopportune of places! Meanwhile, Luffy is waylaid on his way back to the rendezvous, and Jinbe shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hat pirates.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 18
videos.description: Jinbe tells the Straw Hats about Capone “Gang” Bege and proposes a shocking plan to take down Big Mom! But before they are granted an audience with Bege, they must make themselves presentable.
videos.overview: Jinbe tells the Straw Hats about Capone “Gang” Bege and proposes a shocking plan to take down Big Mom! But before they are granted an audience with Bege, they must make themselves presentable.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 19
videos.description: The plan for Big Mom’s assassination is all set. Sanji heads back to his room to avoid suspicion, but Mont d’Or is hot on his trail. The day arrives, and guests from the criminal underground pour in in droves, some with their own agendas to settle.
videos.overview: The plan for Big Mom’s assassination is all set. Sanji heads back to his room to avoid suspicion, but Mont d’Or is hot on his trail. The day arrives, and guests from the criminal underground pour in in droves, some with their own agendas to settle.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 20
videos.description: Final preparations abound, plans come together, and Sanji meets his bride on the altar. As the veil is lifted off Pudding's face, emotions run high, and the chaos begins! As the proverbial icing on the cake, all hell breaks loose as Luffy charges in!
videos.overview: Final preparations abound, plans come together, and Sanji meets his bride on the altar. As the veil is lifted off Pudding's face, emotions run high, and the chaos begins! As the proverbial icing on the cake, all hell breaks loose as Luffy charges in!

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 21
videos.description: The wedding and the precious cake crumble to pieces around Big Mom as a slew of Luffys wreak havoc. The chaos pushes Big Mom past the edge of sanity, so her children make a move against Germa while Pudding takes aim at Sanji.
videos.overview: The wedding and the precious cake crumble to pieces around Big Mom as a slew of Luffys wreak havoc. The chaos pushes Big Mom past the edge of sanity, so her children make a move against Germa while Pudding takes aim at Sanji.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 22
videos.description: Luffy dashes toward Big Mom to show her the broken portrait again, and Sanji attempts to free his family. Here, Big Mom’s tragic and sad history is revealed: from the very beginning, Big Mom's voracious hunger has brought her into conflict with others.
videos.overview: Luffy dashes toward Big Mom to show her the broken portrait again, and Sanji attempts to free his family. Here, Big Mom’s tragic and sad history is revealed: from the very beginning, Big Mom's voracious hunger has brought her into conflict with others.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 23
videos.description: A young Linlin managed to enrage the giants of Elbaph, but Mother Carmel begged for clemency on her behalf. After Carmel’s mysterious disappearance, Linlin fell in with a new cohort and found her reason to go on living.
videos.overview: A young Linlin managed to enrage the giants of Elbaph, but Mother Carmel begged for clemency on her behalf. After Carmel’s mysterious disappearance, Linlin fell in with a new cohort and found her reason to go on living.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 24
videos.description: The Straw Hats and Germa 66 become cornered in Bege's stronghold, and the full might of the Big Mom Pirates is pinning them down! It is only a matter of time before their defenses crack, so they take the only way out and make a break for it.
videos.overview: The Straw Hats and Germa 66 become cornered in Bege's stronghold, and the full might of the Big Mom Pirates is pinning them down! It is only a matter of time before their defenses crack, so they take the only way out and make a break for it.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 25
videos.description: Caesar flies the entire alliance, still inside Bege, out of the venue! However, the full might of the Big Mom Pirates proves too much. The alliance’s annihilation is imminent, but something shakes the playing field.
videos.overview: Caesar flies the entire alliance, still inside Bege, out of the venue! However, the full might of the Big Mom Pirates proves too much. The alliance’s annihilation is imminent, but something shakes the playing field.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 26
videos.description: The Straw Hats continue their mad dash to the Sunny, and Pudding puts her plan to rebuild the cake into action. As Zeus pursues the Straw Hats, Nami keeps him occupied with a shocking surprise that might stop Big Mom in her tracks!
videos.overview: The Straw Hats continue their mad dash to the Sunny, and Pudding puts her plan to rebuild the cake into action. As Zeus pursues the Straw Hats, Nami keeps him occupied with a shocking surprise that might stop Big Mom in her tracks!

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 27
videos.description: Big Mom is relentless in her pursuit of the Straw Hats. Elsewhere, the plan to recreate the wedding cake progresses while Pudding’s unpredictable heart confuses everyone, including herself.
videos.overview: Big Mom is relentless in her pursuit of the Straw Hats. Elsewhere, the plan to recreate the wedding cake progresses while Pudding’s unpredictable heart confuses everyone, including herself.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 28
videos.description: Sandwiched between Big Mom and her advancing fleet, the only hope left to the Sunny is to blast right through it all. Meanwhile, Pedro comes face-to-face with his past and does what he must to ensure the success of his friends.
videos.overview: Sandwiched between Big Mom and her advancing fleet, the only hope left to the Sunny is to blast right through it all. Meanwhile, Pedro comes face-to-face with his past and does what he must to ensure the success of his friends.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 29
videos.description: In the Mirro-world, Luffy confronts the formidable Charlotte Katakuri, Big Mom’s strongest child. Meanwhile, Pudding and Sanji arrive at Cacao Island to remake the cake, but they bicker like a married couple the whole time.
videos.overview: In the Mirro-world, Luffy confronts the formidable Charlotte Katakuri, Big Mom’s strongest child. Meanwhile, Pudding and Sanji arrive at Cacao Island to remake the cake, but they bicker like a married couple the whole time.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 30
videos.description: Nami and Luffy discuss a rendezvous point while the others break the mirrors on the Sunny. Little do they know their plan is overheard, and Luffy’s grueling battle against Katakuri—haki vs. haki, rubber vs. mochi—intensifies.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 31
videos.description: Katakuri retires to his sanctuary to enjoy a merienda—a sweet chance to replenish his haki! But he is not the only one munching away. A mochi mountain has crushed Luffy, and he has found a delectable way to escape.
videos.overview: Katakuri retires to his sanctuary to enjoy a merienda—a sweet chance to replenish his haki! But he is not the only one munching away. A mochi mountain has crushed Luffy, and he has found a delectable way to escape.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 32
videos.description: When Chiffon comes under attack, Sanji must choose between defending her or revealing his whereabouts to his enemies. Elsewhere, Luffy uses Charlotte Brûlée as a human shield to avoid the wrath of Big Mom.
videos.overview: When Chiffon comes under attack, Sanji must choose between defending her or revealing his whereabouts to his enemies. Elsewhere, Luffy uses Charlotte Brûlée as a human shield to avoid the wrath of Big Mom.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 33
videos.description: Sanji and Bege contend with Charlotte Oven, who boils the sea itself! Meanwhile, a vicious pincer attack bears down on the Straw Hats, but Carrot draws on a deep power within and springs to action under the light of the full moon.
videos.overview: Sanji and Bege contend with Charlotte Oven, who boils the sea itself! Meanwhile, a vicious pincer attack bears down on the Straw Hats, but Carrot draws on a deep power within and springs to action under the light of the full moon.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 34
videos.description: Wielding Napoleon and backed by Zeus and Prometheus, Big Mom wreaks havoc on the Sunny. As the Straw Hats try to kick out the Emperor, their ship catches fire! But then, Jinbe steps up to the plate to take a swing.
videos.overview: Wielding Napoleon and backed by Zeus and Prometheus, Big Mom wreaks havoc on the Sunny. As the Straw Hats try to kick out the Emperor, their ship catches fire! But then, Jinbe steps up to the plate to take a swing.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 35
videos.description: The cake is finally brought before Big Mom. With the end of her vicious rampage in sight, the Straw Hats may just get their chance to flee! Big Mom's crew is forced to decide who to attack, and Luffy grows ever closer to mastering his haki.
videos.overview: The cake is finally brought before Big Mom. With the end of her vicious rampage in sight, the Straw Hats may just get their chance to flee! Big Mom's crew is forced to decide who to attack, and Luffy grows ever closer to mastering his haki.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 36
videos.description: Desiring revenge after complete embarrassment, Big Mom’s children band together to smash the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Luffy and Katakuri are locked in a duel to end all duels, where each blow could be the last.
videos.overview: Desiring revenge after complete embarrassment, Big Mom’s children band together to smash the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Luffy and Katakuri are locked in a duel to end all duels, where each blow could be the last.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 37
videos.description: Luffy's dramatic battle finally draws to a close, and a whole host of the Big Mom Pirates watch the last mirror to see who will come through.
videos.overview: Luffy's dramatic battle finally draws to a close, and a whole host of the Big Mom Pirates watch the last mirror to see who will come through.

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 38
videos.description: Sanji tries his best to save himself and his captain. Now, the fate of Totto Land rests on the taste of the wedding cake! With the help of Germa and the Sun Pirates, the Straw Hats see their chance to escape!
videos.overview: Sanji tries his best to save himself and his captain. Now, the fate of Totto Land rests on the taste of the wedding cake! With the help of Germa and the Sun Pirates, the Straw Hats see their chance to escape!

videos.title: Whole Cake Island 39
videos.description: As the Big Mom Pirate fleet approaches, Jinbe makes a crucial decision. At a great cost of energy and life, the Straw Hats make it out of Totto Land. Left behind in their wake are allies, friends, and would-be lovers.
videos.overview: As the Big Mom Pirate fleet approaches, Jinbe makes a crucial decision. At a great cost of energy and life, the Straw Hats make it out of Totto Land. Left behind in their wake are allies, friends, and would-be lovers.

videos.title: Okobore Town
videos.description: Otama is kidnapped by Kaido’s gifters and taken to a flourishing settlement called Bakura Town where a creepy-looking headliner was expecting her. Luffy, Zoro, and the samurai Okiku rush to her rescue.
videos.overview: Otama is kidnapped by Kaido’s gifters and taken to a flourishing settlement called Bakura Town where a creepy-looking headliner was expecting her. Luffy, Zoro, and the samurai Okiku rush to her rescue.

videos.title: Wano's Grand Sumo Tournament
videos.description: Luffy challenges Urashima, the strongest yokozuna in Wano, to a sumo match! However, Urashima is willing to resort to illegal moves. Meanwhile, Holdem tells Otama that he must punish her for a crime she committed.
videos.overview: Luffy challenges Urashima, the strongest yokozuna in Wano, to a sumo match! However, Urashima is willing to resort to illegal moves. Meanwhile, Holdem tells Otama that he must punish her for a crime she committed.

videos.title: The Provisions Ship
videos.description: Luffy and co. finally find Otama hanging from the mouth of a lion in Holdem’s stomach. Luffy prepares to save Otama from Kaido’s lackey, and elsewhere, a mysterious figure confronts Basil Hawkins.
videos.overview: Luffy and co. finally find Otama hanging from the mouth of a lion in Holdem’s stomach. Luffy prepares to save Otama from Kaido’s lackey, and elsewhere, a mysterious figure confronts Basil Hawkins.

videos.title: The Ruins of Oden Castle
videos.description: Zoro and the others dash out of Bakura Town on the treasure ship filled with food! Luffy catches up to them, and together, they distribute food and water to the people of Okobore Town. Later, Law takes them to the ruins of a hilltop castle.
videos.overview: Zoro and the others dash out of Bakura Town on the treasure ship filled with food! Luffy catches up to them, and together, they distribute food and water to the people of Okobore Town. Later, Law takes them to the ruins of a hilltop castle.

videos.title: I Love Oden
videos.description: Kin’emon tells Luffy and the others about how Kozuki Oden brought peace to Kuri and became its daimyo. However, he was set up by Kaido and Orochi. When Kin’emon ran to save Oden’s wife, she revealed a shocking truth.
videos.overview: Kin’emon tells Luffy and the others about how Kozuki Oden brought peace to Kuri and became its daimyo. However, he was set up by Kaido and Orochi. When Kin’emon ran to save Oden’s wife, she revealed a shocking truth.

videos.title: Shutenmaru
videos.description: Ashura Doji, a.k.a Shutenmaru, is one of the allies Kin’emon wants to search for, and he leads a raid on Okobore Town to steal the food that Luffy brought. This unrest prompts the drunken Kaido to fly above Okobore Town in his dragon form.
videos.overview: Ashura Doji, a.k.a Shutenmaru, is one of the allies Kin’emon wants to search for, and he leads a raid on Okobore Town to steal the food that Luffy brought. This unrest prompts the drunken Kaido to fly above Okobore Town in his dragon form.

videos.title: Emperor Kaido vs. Luffy
videos.description: Infuriated by Kaido’s violence toward his allies, Luffy lands blow after blow on the drunken Emperor. When he activates Gear Fourth and launches even more powerful attacks, Kaido fights back. Law tries to rescue Luffy but is interrupted by Hawkins.
videos.overview: Infuriated by Kaido’s violence toward his allies, Luffy lands blow after blow on the drunken Emperor. When he activates Gear Fourth and launches even more powerful attacks, Kaido fights back. Law tries to rescue Luffy but is interrupted by Hawkins.

videos.title: Hah
videos.description: Luffy is sent to a great mine where prisoners must endure harsh, forced labor. There, he has an unexpected reunion. Meanwhile, Okiku rushes to the ruins of Oden Castle to confirm the safety of the Straw Hats and the others.
videos.overview: Luffy is sent to a great mine where prisoners must endure harsh, forced labor. There, he has an unexpected reunion. Meanwhile, Okiku rushes to the ruins of Oden Castle to confirm the safety of the Straw Hats and the others.

videos.title: Void
videos.description: Perona prepares to leave Gloom Island after she finds out that her captain, Gecko Moria, is still alive. Meanwhile, Moria raids the infamous Pirate Island with his zombie army to retrieve his old friend from Blackbeard.
videos.overview: Perona prepares to leave Gloom Island after she finds out that her captain, Gecko Moria, is still alive. Meanwhile, Moria raids the infamous Pirate Island with his zombie army to retrieve his old friend from Blackbeard.

videos.title: Otoko the Kamuro
videos.description: In the Prisoner Mining Camp, Luffy’s and Kid’s competition garners the wrong kind of attention. Meanwhile, Sanji’s soba becomes immensely popular, but gang members disturb his business and knock over a customer’s bowl.
videos.overview: In the Prisoner Mining Camp, Luffy’s and Kid’s competition garners the wrong kind of attention. Meanwhile, Sanji’s soba becomes immensely popular, but gang members disturb his business and knock over a customer’s bowl.

videos.title: Oiran Komurasaki Arrives
videos.description: Wano’s top courtesan—the oiran Komurasaki—is in procession and slowly makes her way to Orochi Palace. While everyone is fascinated by the oiran, some seeking vengeance get in her way.
videos.overview: Wano’s top courtesan—the oiran Komurasaki—is in procession and slowly makes her way to Orochi Palace. While everyone is fascinated by the oiran, some seeking vengeance get in her way.

videos.title: Soba Mask
videos.description: In the Flower Capital, a member of the Beast Pirates, Page One, attacks every soba restaurant in search of Sanji. The Straw Hat’s cook faces Kaido’s headliner while using Germa’s device for the first time to hide his identity.
videos.overview: In the Flower Capital, a member of the Beast Pirates, Page One, attacks every soba restaurant in search of Sanji. The Straw Hat’s cook faces Kaido’s headliner while using Germa’s device for the first time to hide his identity.

videos.title: The Shogun and the Oiran
videos.description: At the shogun’s banquet, the oiran’s child attendant Otoko bursts with laughter and cannot stop. The enraged Shogun Orochi attacks her, but an unexpected person stands in his way. To end the to-do, Kyoshiro takes matters into his own hands.
videos.overview: At the shogun’s banquet, the oiran’s child attendant Otoko bursts with laughter and cannot stop. The enraged Shogun Orochi attacks her, but an unexpected person stands in his way. To end the to-do, Kyoshiro takes matters into his own hands.

videos.title: Hyogoro the Flower
videos.description: Chopper’s group is off to rescue Luffy from the Prisoner Mining Camp, but the Straw Hat captain is in a bit of a bind. While Luffy tries to save old man Hyo from execution, Queen the Plague comes to visit the prison.
videos.overview: Chopper’s group is off to rescue Luffy from the Prisoner Mining Camp, but the Straw Hat captain is in a bit of a bind. While Luffy tries to save old man Hyo from execution, Queen the Plague comes to visit the prison.

videos.title: Gyukimaru of Oihagi Bridge
videos.description: Luffy fights in an endless sumo match to protect old man Hyo, and Nami, Robin, and Shinobu are cornered as Hawkins raids the bathhouse. Elsewhere, Zoro faces a samurai who accuses him of stealing Shusui, but their duel is interrupted by a woman’s scream.
videos.overview: Luffy fights in an endless sumo match to protect old man Hyo, and Nami, Robin, and Shinobu are cornered as Hawkins raids the bathhouse. Elsewhere, Zoro faces a samurai who accuses him of stealing Shusui, but their duel is interrupted by a woman’s scream.

videos.title: A Woman's Secret
videos.description: The wounded Zoro wakes up to find out the shocking identity of the woman he saved and is told the unbelievable tale of twenty years earlier. Meanwhile, Luffy’s “training” is not getting anywhere, but a surprising person gives him his first lesson.
videos.overview: The wounded Zoro wakes up to find out the shocking identity of the woman he saved and is told the unbelievable tale of twenty years earlier. Meanwhile, Luffy’s “training” is not getting anywhere, but a surprising person gives him his first lesson.

videos.title: Sparks of Rebellion
videos.description: The smiling man Tonoyasu leaves all who met him mystified, what with his familiar terms of address and his shocking knowledge of the rebellion. In Udon prison, Luffy continues his new haki training, and during a brief respite, Raizo appears before him.
videos.overview: The smiling man Tonoyasu leaves all who met him mystified, what with his familiar terms of address and his shocking knowledge of the rebellion. In Udon prison, Luffy continues his new haki training, and during a brief respite, Raizo appears before him.

videos.title: Shimotsuki Yasuie, the Daimyo of Hakumai
videos.description: Tonoyasu has been strung up and awaits his inevitable execution while all of Wano is shocked to find out who he really is. The citizens cry out in outrage, and the doomed man raises his voice in a final act of rebellion against Shogun Orochi.
videos.overview: Tonoyasu has been strung up and awaits his inevitable execution while all of Wano is shocked to find out who he really is. The citizens cry out in outrage, and the doomed man raises his voice in a final act of rebellion against Shogun Orochi.

videos.title: SMILE
videos.description: The truth behind the smiles of the Ebisu villagers finally comes to light, the Shogun and Kaido’s plan revealed! And in Udon Luffy and Hyo are shocked to see Captain Kid return in chains alongside a smiling newcomer.
videos.overview: The truth behind the smiles of the Ebisu villagers finally comes to light, the Shogun and Kaido’s plan revealed! And in Udon Luffy and Hyo are shocked to see Captain Kid return in chains alongside a smiling newcomer.

videos.title: Partners
videos.description: A very big and hungry visitor arrives at Udon looking for Superstar Queen’s sweet red bean oshiruko, and Rasetsu town is in a full-blown riot with the Straw Hats at the center!
videos.overview: A very big and hungry visitor arrives at Udon looking for Superstar Queen’s sweet red bean oshiruko, and Rasetsu town is in a full-blown riot with the Straw Hats at the center!

videos.title: Queen vs. Olin
videos.description: To Chopper’s surprise, the kind and sweet Olin—a.k.a. Emperor Big Mom—has proven her power to be just as devastating as ever. Olin’s hunger pangs just about reach their limit, and Luffy must act quickly before his mechanical collar executes him.
videos.overview: To Chopper’s surprise, the kind and sweet Olin—a.k.a. Emperor Big Mom—has proven her power to be just as devastating as ever. Olin’s hunger pangs just about reach their limit, and Luffy must act quickly before his mechanical collar executes him.

videos.title: Mummy
videos.description: Babanuki unleashes an unthinkable weapon, and a mysterious figure emerges from a forbidden cell to save Luffy. Then, Old Man Hyo emboldens Raizo and Kiku to reveal their true identities and give the desperate prisoners some much-needed hope.
videos.overview: Babanuki unleashes an unthinkable weapon, and a mysterious figure emerges from a forbidden cell to save Luffy. Then, Old Man Hyo emboldens Raizo and Kiku to reveal their true identities and give the desperate prisoners some much-needed hope.

videos.title: Warriors' Dream
videos.description: In Udon, an unexpected person stands up to bring the prisoners renewed hope! Elsewhere, Zoro and Hiyori are pursued by ninja, Orochi is told of Trafalgar Law’s capture, and the people of the Flower Capital prepare for the upcoming Fire Festival.
videos.overview: In Udon, an unexpected person stands up to bring the prisoners renewed hope! Elsewhere, Zoro and Hiyori are pursued by ninja, Orochi is told of Trafalgar Law’s capture, and the people of the Flower Capital prepare for the upcoming Fire Festival.

videos.title: RAMPAGE
videos.description: Kanjuro takes Yasuie’s body to bury him with Oden, and Robin, Usopp, and Brook cleverly pass a checkpoint. While Big Mom and Kaido clash at Onigashima, Old Man Hyo finds his former allies in Udon. And in Ringo, Zoro faces Gyukimaru once more.
videos.overview: Kanjuro takes Yasuie’s body to bury him with Oden, and Robin, Usopp, and Brook cleverly pass a checkpoint. While Big Mom and Kaido clash at Onigashima, Old Man Hyo finds his former allies in Udon. And in Ringo, Zoro faces Gyukimaru once more.

videos.title: The Onefold Fox
videos.description: Zoro runs after the warrior-monk who took Shusui, and Kawamatsu shares his memory of a fox that was guarding the graves in Ringo. Soon, they find a room filled with swords, and Hiyori tells Zoro to give Shusui back to the land of Wano.
videos.overview: Zoro runs after the warrior-monk who took Shusui, and Kawamatsu shares his memory of a fox that was guarding the graves in Ringo. Soon, they find a room filled with swords, and Hiyori tells Zoro to give Shusui back to the land of Wano.

videos.title: Enma
videos.description: As the day of the raid approaches, Kin’emon discusses the plan, and at Onigashima, Kaido and Big Mom make a surprising declaration! In the meantime, Zoro is stunned by Enma’s demonic power and its ties to him.
videos.overview: As the day of the raid approaches, Kin’emon discusses the plan, and at Onigashima, Kaido and Big Mom make a surprising declaration! In the meantime, Zoro is stunned by Enma’s demonic power and its ties to him.
